---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for OpenAnima
title: "[FEATURE]"
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

## Feature description

Describe the feature or improvement you would like to see.

---

## Problem or use case

What problem would this solve?

Example:
I want to use OpenAnima for streamer overlays, but I need better animation controls.

---

## Proposed solution

Describe how you imagine this feature working.

---

## Alternatives considered

Have you considered any other solution or workaround?

---

## Additional context

Add mockups, screenshots, examples, or references if available.
